news.title: Sources: Pulisic has microfracture, bone bruise
news.summary: USMNT and AC Milan attacker Christian Pulisic sustained a bone bruise and microfracture in his lower leg and will be sidelined for several weeks, U.S. Soccer confirmed on Thursday.
